## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees Gloria Willis and Will Ruzvidzo to GrowthX, introducing key tools, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses Slack, Geekbot, Linear, Notion, and various other tools for communication and project management](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [New hires should complete onboarding tasks in Notion and Linear, including watching company videos and attending key meetings](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [GrowthX has an unlimited PTO policy and offers employee referral bonuses (up to $10K for engineering, $5K for non-engineering roles)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [New employees will introduce themselves at the next bi-weekly all-hands meeting (Tuesday next week)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

## Topics

### Company Tools and Platforms

  - [Slack: Primary internal communication tool](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Geekbot: Integrated with Slack for daily stand-ups (9am local time)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Linear: Project management and IT ticket system](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Notion: Knowledge management for SOPs and shared workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Additional tools: Airtable, SEMrush (for managing editor), Loom, Zoom, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Onboarding Resources and Process

  - [Notion handbook contains detailed onboarding information](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Linear tracks onboarding tasks with day/week tags](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Key onboarding activities:](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Tool setup (1Password, Zoom, Slack, Notion, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Meet managers and onboarding buddy](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
      - [Read company articles and watch workshops/webinars](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [Attend strategy/vision meeting with Marcel (CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Customer use cases meeting with Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Company Policies and Programs

  - [Minimum 4-hour overlap with Pacific time required](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy (no approval needed, just calendar blocking)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Employee referral program: Up to $10K for engineering roles, $5K for non-engineering (after 6-month retention)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meetings (next one on Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

### Team Email Setup

  - <team@growthxlabs.com> email used for accessing shared tools and scheduling client calls
  - [Setup process involves adding account in Gmail using credentials from 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete onboarding tasks in Notion and Linear](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Watch onboarding webcam recordings before meeting with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Add personal profile to the team directory in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Install 1Password Chrome extension for easier access](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Prepare a brief introduction for the upcoming all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Reach out to Alice on Slack for any additional questions or assistance](https://fathom.video/share/H8gNsTdrH37-6V8U6pSzti3Y4_4pdSoq?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
